common_feedback: Pivot to recruiter as primary customer — they have budget and are  actively struggling to verify AI skills. Regenerate discovery with  recruiter as ICP, candidate as the supply side of the marketplace.

Primary value is the signal — recruiters pay for verified proof of  hands-on AI skills, not candidate access. We are not building a  marketplace. Think of it like a skills verification layer that sits  on top of LinkedIn. Approve this direction and move to roadmap.
